title: Leaderboard stats
goal: Show a Coins value for each player in the default leaderboard UI.

steps.body: Roblox games get a free in-game leaderboard as soon as each player has a `Folder` named `leaderstats` under them containing `IntValue` or `StringValue` objects. No UI work required — the engine picks it up automatically. This lesson wires that up for a single 'Coins' stat.
Create a server script under ServerScriptService. It'll listen for `Players.PlayerAdded` and build the folder+value structure.
steps.source:
-- Leaderstats bootstrap — runs on the server for every joining player.
local Players = game:GetService("Players")

local function onPlayerAdded(player)
	local folder = Instance.new("Folder")
	folder.Name = "leaderstats"
	folder.Parent = player
end

Players.PlayerAdded:Connect(onPlayerAdded)

steps.body: Add an `IntValue` named `Coins` inside the folder. Because the folder is named exactly `leaderstats`, the engine recognises it and shows `Coins` as a column automatically.
steps.source:
-- Leaderstats bootstrap — runs on the server for every joining player.
local Players = game:GetService("Players")

local function onPlayerAdded(player)
	local folder = Instance.new("Folder")
	folder.Name = "leaderstats"
	folder.Parent = player

	local coins = Instance.new("IntValue")
	coins.Name = "Coins"
	coins.Value = 0
	coins.Parent = folder
end

Players.PlayerAdded:Connect(onPlayerAdded)

steps.body: Give every player +1 coin per second with a simple loop. Any code that touches a player's stats should run on the server — client-side writes don't replicate for security.
steps.source:
-- Leaderstats bootstrap — runs on the server for every joining player.
local Players = game:GetService("Players")

local function onPlayerAdded(player)
	local folder = Instance.new("Folder")
	folder.Name = "leaderstats"
	folder.Parent = player

	local coins = Instance.new("IntValue")
	coins.Name = "Coins"
	coins.Value = 0
	coins.Parent = folder

	while player.Parent do
		task.wait(1)
		coins.Value += 1
	end
end

Players.PlayerAdded:Connect(onPlayerAdded)

steps.body: Press ▶ Play (F5). The leaderboard appears in the top-right and the Coins counter ticks up once per second. Shift+F5 to stop. Try running two clients from Test → Start → 2 players to see how each player gets their own counter.
